claims.summary: The typed spectral fingerprint must preserve the legacy 32-slot geometry without precision loss.
claims.disposition: Verified SpectralFingerprintV1::to_legacy_slots, typed precedence, exact-width validation, and aligned/divergent integrity tests.

claims.summary: Hybrid coherence needs correct zero-reference and f64 epsilon behavior.
claims.disposition: Verified the zero/zero coherence branch, finite exact-width checks, RMS normalization, and edge-case tests in types/schema/tests.rs.

claims.summary: Loose shadow and stable-core JSON may hide schema drift until rendering.
claims.disposition: Preserve this as a schema-evolution risk while verifying current decode, compatibility, and typed-fingerprint integrity checks; no current malformed packet was evidenced.

claims.summary: Remaining shadow and compatibility JSON fields should become dedicated wire structs.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 protocol/ABI wait because changing shared telemetry schemas requires consumer-first compatibility, protocol fixtures, Minime coordination, and explicit operator authorization.
